tasks.title: Promote the staged user_settings migration into the live migrations tree
tasks.dod: Promoted migration applies and reverts cleanly on live MySQL via the in-process runner; FK CASCADE verified

tasks.title: Promote the staged storyboard_history origin/preview_kind migration
tasks.dod: INSTANT ALTER applies and reverts cleanly; existing rows read origin=legacy/preview_kind NULL; panel query EXPLAIN uses idx_storyboard_history_draft_origin

tasks.title: Settings repository + service: effective read with defaults, lazy upsert
tasks.dod: Integration tests on live MySQL pass: missing row yields default 60/updatedAt null, lazy upsert creates then updates a single row

tasks.title: Settings endpoints: GET/PUT /users/me/settings with preset whitelist
tasks.dod: GET returns effective settings (defaults when no row); PUT accepts only 30/60/120/300/600 else 400; 401 without token; responses match the OpenAPI contract

tasks.title: Checkpoint push: POST history stamps origin=checkpoint and stores previewKind
tasks.dod: Push with required previewKind inserts origin=checkpoint row and prunes beyond 50 across mixed origins; missing previewKind is 400; plan-apply insert writes explicit origin

tasks.title: History list: filter to origin=checkpoint and expose previewKind
tasks.dod: GET returns only checkpoint entries newest-first with previewKind, max 50, legacy rows remain stored; non-owner gets 403

tasks.title: captureCanvasThumbnail: 5-second timeout with typed fallback result
tasks.dod: Unit tests pass: success yields screenshot+dataUrl, failure or >5 s yields minimap kind and resolves by the timeout; existing consumers unbroken

tasks.title: Settings feature module: page with interval presets, route, Home menu item
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: presets render with stored value, save confirms, failed PUT shows not-saved message keeping previous value; /settings route protected and reachable from HomeSidebar

tasks.title: Rework useStoryboardHistoryPush into the checkpoint push client
tasks.dod: One request carries snapshot+previewKind (screenshot inline on success, minimap on capture failure — push always happens); POST failure shows a visible error state and retries; inFlight exposed

tasks.title: useCheckpointScheduler: countdown, idle, deferral, overdue, double-save guard
tasks.dod: Fake-timer unit tests pass one per AC: interval fire, drag/typing deferral capped at one extra interval, overdue within 10 s on visibility, idle creates nothing, countdown resets, manual save undeferred, double-save guarded, session default 60 s on settings-read failure

tasks.title: CheckpointCountdownBar + CheckpointCaptureOverlay components
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: ticking countdown, idle all-saved state with inactive Save, Save triggers manual checkpoint and disables while in flight, overlay shows during capture only

tasks.title: History panel: previewKind rendering + pre-restore checkpoint before Restore
tasks.dod: Panel renders screenshot image vs SnapshotMinimap by previewKind; restore with newer changes pushes a pre-restore checkpoint first and never blocks on its failure

tasks.title: Lightweight autosave: visible not-saved indicator + automatic retry
tasks.dod: Failed PUT shows a not-saved status and auto-retries until success without user edits; editing never blocked; existing debounce/dedupe tests stay green

tasks.title: Wire two-tier saving into StoryboardPage: mount scheduler/bar/overlay, remove per-change pushes
tasks.dod: Page integration test: N consecutive changes produce zero history pushes (only lightweight saves); bar top-right and overlay mounted; history-seed reconciled; existing page tests green

tasks.title: E2E (Playwright): checkpoint flows, slow-capture fallback, settings journey
tasks.dod: All scenarios green against the live stack in CI, including a deterministic forced slow-capture that yields a minimap entry with the loader dismissed

tasks.title: KPI-1 baseline: document + run the one-week history write-rate count
tasks.dod: _audit/kpi1-baseline.md records the SQL, measurement window, baseline number and author; spec §8 OQ-3 and the sad §11 open-question row are closed
